# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
- type: "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines"
  name: "[parameters('vmName')]"
  apiVersion: "2019-12-01"
  location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
  properties:
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: "[parameters('vmSize')]"
    storageProfile:
      osDisk:
        createOption: "FromImage"
        managedDisk:
          storageAccountType: "Premium_LRS"
      dataDisks:
      - lun: 0
        diskSizeGB: 128
        createOption: "Empty"
    osProfile:
      computerName: "[parameters('vmComputerName')]"
      adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
      adminPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
      - id: "[concat(resourceGroup().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces/', parameters('nicName'))]"
    diagnosticsProfile:
      bootDiagnostics:
        enabled: true
        storageUri: "[concat(reference(concat(resourceGroup().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', variables('diagStorageAccountName')), '2019-06-01').primaryEndpoints.blob)]"
